R0228.title: Dependency Confusion and Malicious Package Poisoning
R0228.definition: Attackers publish same-name or look-alike packages that cause build systems to download malicious components.
keywords: Dependency Confusion and Malicious Package Poisoning
R0228.description: Attackers publish same-name or look-alike packages that cause build systems to download malicious components.
R0228.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
